ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of product details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of customer details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer submitting the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating associated with the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being flagged */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the review was flagged */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flag has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who resolved the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
